data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: WhatsApp employs microservices to manage different functionalities independently.
data.technical_spec: Use of containerized services and APIs for communication.

data.title: Scalable Server Infrastructure
data.description: Architecture optimized for handling billions of messages per day.
data.technical_spec: Utilizes Erlang-based servers for concurrency and scalability.

data.title: End-to-End Encryption Integration
data.description: Implements Signal Protocol to provide secure messaging between users.
data.technical_spec: Encryption keys stored only on user devices.

data.title: Data Storage Optimization
data.description: Efficient data storage techniques to manage chat histories and media.
data.technical_spec: Backed by databases like MySQL and cloud storage solutions.

data.title: Global Data Centers
data.description: Distributed data centers to ensure high availability and reduced latency.
data.technical_spec: Strategically located servers globally to minimize data travel.
